content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom index 30 (C:30) in the molecule. From the image, I can see that atom C:30 is connected to:

1. C:14 (carbon) - visible as a yellow/gold sphere connected to C:30
2. O:34 (oxygen) - visible as a red sphere connected to C:30
3. H:31 (hydrogen) - visible as a gray/white sphere connected to C:30

Let me double-check these connections by examining the bonds more carefully. The image shows C:30 with three bonds:
- One bond to C:14 (going upward/left)
- One bond to O:34 (going to the right)
- One bond to H:31 (going downward)

Based on the XYZ file name "geomconf_1035.xyz", the geomconf_index for this molecule is 1035.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 30 (C) are:
- Atom index 14, element C
- Atom index 34, element O
- Atom index 31, element H

And the geomconf_index is 1035.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 30, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
